keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Own Goal by Ellyes Skhiri, Tunisia. Tunisia 0, Netherlands 1.

Goal! Tunisia 0, Netherlands 2. Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Virgil van Dijk with a headed pass following a set piece situation.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half begins Tunisia 0, Netherlands 2.
Goal! Tunisia 1, Netherlands 2. Hazem Mastouri (Tunisia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Hannibal Mejbri with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Tunisia 1, Netherlands 3. Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands) header from the left side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Tijjani Reijnders with a cross following a corner.
keyEvents.shortText: Jan Paul van Hecke Goal - Header

keyEvents.text: Substitution, Tunisia. Hadj Mahmoud replaces Rani Khedira.
Substitution, Tunisia. Elias Achouri replaces Anis Ben Slimane.
Substitution, Tunisia. Mortadha Ben Ouanes replaces Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Frenkie de Jong.
Substitution, Netherlands. Justin Kluivert replaces Tijjani Reijnders.
Substitution, Netherlands. Crysencio Summerville replaces Donyell Malen.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Tunisia. Firas Chaouat replaces Ismaël Gharbi.
Substitution, Netherlands. Memphis Depay replaces Brian Brobbey.
Substitution, Netherlands. Noa Lang replaces Cody Gakpo.
Substitution, Tunisia. Sebastian Tounekti replaces Hazem Mastouri.
Second Half ends, Tunisia 1, Netherlands 3.
